descFull: Production focused Self-harnessed LM runtime (RLM) that allows the LM to call its sub-lm with DSPy signatures. Define your inputs, outputs, and tools — the model handles its own control flow. Get fully interpretable trajectories and performance that scales directly with model improvements. Without context rot.
